project.name: memberbase
project.description: Self-hosted membership and donor management web app for small associations, handling member lifecycle, accounting, group organization, and follow-up tracking.

domains.name: Members
domains.description: Core member entity management including personal data, status lifecycle, deduplication, and filtering.

flows.name: Member Lifecycle
flows.description: Full lifecycle from creation through editing, group assignment, and eventual deactivation or removal.

steps.name: Create Member
steps.description: Register a new member with personal data fields.

steps.name: Edit General Data
steps.description: Update member personal information such as name, email, address, phone, and birthdate.

steps.name: Assign to Groups
steps.description: Add the member to one or more teams via user_properties records.

steps.name: Deactivate / Anonymize / Delete
steps.description: Set status=0 to deactivate, anonymize personal data, or permanently delete the member.

flows.name: Member Search and Filter
flows.description: Find members using virtual filters for unpaid cotisation, lapsed status, or group membership.

steps.name: Apply Filter
steps.description: Filter member list by group, metagroup, lapsed, or unpaid virtual filters.

steps.name: View Member Detail
steps.description: Display full member profile including groups, compta history, and suivi notes.

flows.name: Merge Duplicate Members
flows.description: Identify duplicate member records and merge them by selecting which fields to keep.

steps.name: Detect Duplicate
steps.description: Surface potential duplicate members based on name or email similarity.

steps.name: Select and Merge Fields
steps.description: Choose which field values to retain and merge the two records into one.

domains.name: Donors
domains.description: Donor identification, year-over-year analysis, and attestation PDF generation for tax purposes.

flows.name: Donor Analysis
flows.description: Summarize donation activity by year and classify donors as new, loyal, or lapsed.

steps.name: View Donor Summary
steps.description: Display aggregated donation totals per member per year.

steps.name: Classify Donors
steps.description: Identify new donors (first year), loyal donors (consecutive years), and lapsed donors (gave last year, not this year).

flows.name: Attestation Generation
flows.description: Generate and deliver PDF tax attestations for qualifying donors.

steps.name: Toggle Attestation Flag
steps.description: Mark a compta entry as eligible for attestation PDF generation.

steps.name: Generate PDF Attestation
steps.description: Produce a filled PDF attestation via pdftk-java from the base template using member and donation data.

steps.name: Export Donor List
steps.description: Export the donor list for the selected year for external use.

domains.name: Groups
domains.description: Team and metagroup management including member import, visibility control, and category assignment.

flows.name: Group Management
flows.description: Create and configure teams, assign them to metagroup categories, and control visibility.

steps.name: Create Group
steps.description: Define a new team with a name and optional hidden flag.

steps.name: Assign to Metagroup Category
steps.description: Link the team to a metagroup so it appears under the correct navigation filter.

steps.name: Bulk Show / Hide Groups
steps.description: Toggle the hidden flag on multiple teams at once.

flows.name: Member Import into Group
flows.description: Populate a group by importing members from other groups, cotisants, or donors.

steps.name: Select Import Source
steps.description: Choose the source set: another group, all current cotisants, or all donors.

steps.name: Import Members
steps.description: Add the selected members to the target group via bulk user_properties inserts.

domains.name: Accounting
domains.description: Financial entry management covering cotisation and donation records with type classification.

flows.name: Accounting Entry Management
flows.description: Record, update, and remove cotisation or donation entries for members.

steps.name: Add Compta Entry
steps.description: Create a new accounting entry linked to a member, specifying type, date, and amount.

steps.name: Edit Entry
steps.description: Modify the amount, date, or type of an existing compta entry.

steps.name: Delete Entry
steps.description: Remove an accounting entry and update the member status accordingly.

flows.name: Cotisation Tracking
flows.description: Verify whether each member has paid their annual cotisation to drive unpaid/lapsed virtual filters.

steps.name: Check Cotisation Status
steps.description: Evaluate isCotisationPayed() by querying compta for a cotisation-type entry in the current year.

steps.name: View Compta Types
steps.description: List available entry types with their cotisation and donation flags and display colors.

domains.name: Follow-up (Suivi)
domains.description: Key-value member attributes and free-text follow-up notes attached to individual members.

flows.name: Follow-up Note Management
flows.description: Create, update, and delete follow-up notes or custom attribute values for a member.

steps.name: Add Suivi Note
steps.description: Attach a new follow-up note or attribute entry to a member record.

steps.name: Edit Note
steps.description: Update the content of an existing suivi note or attribute value.

steps.name: Delete Note
steps.description: Remove a suivi entry from the member record.

flows.name: Custom Attribute Tracking
flows.description: Store and retrieve arbitrary key-value attributes per member for flexible data extension.

steps.name: Set Attribute
steps.description: Write a key-value pair to user_properties for a given member.

steps.name: List Member Attributes
steps.description: Retrieve all attributes and notes associated with a specific member.

domains.name: Administration
domains.description: Application configuration, user role management, data integrity checks, and audit log maintenance.

flows.name: App User Management
flows.description: Invite, create, and assign roles to application users who access the system.

steps.name: Invite User
steps.description: Generate an invitation token and send it to a new application user.

steps.name: Assign Role
steps.description: Set the application user role to admin, manager, user, or readonly.

flows.name: Settings Configuration
flows.description: Manage organization-wide settings such as org name and default team assignments.

steps.name: Edit Settings
steps.description: Update key-value pairs in app_settings for organization name and default teams.

steps.name: Manage Group Categories
steps.description: Create, rename, or delete metagroups used for navigation shortcuts.

flows.name: Audit Log Maintenance
flows.description: Review and periodically flush the audit trail of all system mutations.

steps.name: View Audit Log
steps.description: Browse the full chronological log of all create, update, and delete actions.

steps.name: Flush Audit Log
steps.description: Permanently delete old audit log entries to reclaim storage.

domains.name: Authentication
domains.description: Login, session management, forced password changes, and token-based user invitation flow.

flows.name: Login Flow
flows.description: Authenticate an application user and establish a session, enforcing password change if required.

steps.name: Submit Credentials
steps.description: Validate username and password against app_users and start the session.

steps.name: Forced Password Change
steps.description: Redirect the user to set a new password before accessing the application if the flag is set.

flows.name: User Invitation Flow
flows.description: Allow an admin to invite a new user via a single-use token link that sets their initial password.

steps.name: Generate Invitation Token
steps.description: Create a time-limited token stored with the pending app_users record.

steps.name: Accept Invitation
steps.description: New user follows the token link, sets their password, and activates their account.

crossDomainLinks.description: Member records are the subject of all compta entries; isCotisationPayed() and hasDonated() query the compta table.
Group membership is stored as user_properties records keyed to each member.
Suivi notes and custom attributes are anchored to individual member records.
Donor classification and attestation generation are driven entirely by compta entries with donation-type flags.
Donor views augment member records with year-over-year donation summaries.
Group import flows use compta data to identify cotisants and donors as import sources.
Admins manage app_users records and issue invitation tokens consumed by the authentication flow.
Admins create and manage metagroups that organize teams for navigation.
Both domains write to user_properties-adjacent structures to extend member data beyond core fields.
